frontend/src/bee-atlas.ts.description: Root app component. Owns all reactive state: filterState, visibleEcdysisIds/SampleIds, layerMode, boundaryMode, selection. Coordinates bee-map and bee-sidebar via properties and custom events.

frontend/src/bee-map.ts.description: OpenLayers map component. Renders specimen clusters (EcdysisSource) and sample dots (SampleSource). Fires view-moved, map-click-specimen, map-click-sample, map-click-region events upward to bee-atlas.

frontend/src/bee-sidebar.ts.description: Sidebar component. Displays data summary, filter controls, specimen/sample detail panels. Exports key data interfaces shared across components.

frontend/src/bee-filter-controls.ts.description: Filter UI component: taxon selector, year range, month pickers, county/ecoregion multi-select. Fires filter-changed event.

frontend/src/bee-specimen-detail.ts.description: Detail panel for clicked specimen clusters — lists samples and species.

frontend/src/bee-sample-detail.ts.description: Detail panel for clicked iNaturalist sample events.

frontend/src/duckdb.ts.description: DuckDB WASM singleton. Initializes browser DuckDB, loads ecdysis.parquet and samples.parquet via HTTP, registers counties.geojson and ecoregions.geojson as buffers. Exports tablesReady promise for filter queries to await.

frontend/src/filter.ts.description: Filter logic. Defines FilterState interface. buildFilterSQL generates WHERE clauses for both ecdysis and samples tables. queryVisibleIds executes DuckDB queries and returns ID sets used to ghost unmatched map features.

frontend/src/features.ts.description: OpenLayers VectorSource subclasses. EcdysisSource loads all specimen records from DuckDB ecdysis table as OL Features. SampleSource loads iNat sample events from DuckDB samples table.

frontend/src/region-layer.ts.description: County and ecoregion boundary OL layers. Eagerly loads both GeoJSON sources on module init. makeRegionStyleFn returns a style function that highlights selected regions based on filterState.

frontend/src/style.ts.description: OL style factory functions. makeClusterStyleFn returns a cluster style function (reads visibleEcdysisIds via closure). makeSampleDotStyleFn returns a sample dot style function. Recency coloring based on Temporal.Now.

frontend/src/url-state.ts.description: URL serialization/deserialization. buildParams encodes view, filter, selection, and UI state into URLSearchParams. parseParams decodes them back. Used for browser history push/pop.

data/run.py.description: Pipeline orchestrator. Runs all 6 steps in sequence: geographies -> ecdysis -> ecdysis-links -> inaturalist -> projects -> anti-entropy -> export.

data/export.py.description: Exports 4 frontend data files from beeatlas.duckdb to frontend/public/data/: ecdysis.parquet (specimen data), samples.parquet (iNat sample events), counties.geojson (WA counties), ecoregions.geojson (WA ecoregions). Uses DuckDB spatial extension for geometry joins.

data/ecdysis_pipeline.py.description: dlt pipeline for Ecdysis Museum bee specimen data. load_ecdysis ingests occurrence records; load_links scrapes iNaturalist observation links.

data/inaturalist_pipeline.py.description: dlt pipeline for iNaturalist bee-netting project observations (Washington Bee Atlas iNat project data).

data/geographies_pipeline.py.description: Loads geographic boundary data: US counties (WA), EPA Level 3 ecoregions. Stores in geographies schema in DuckDB.

data/anti_entropy_pipeline.py.description: Data quality reconciliation step. Ensures cross-table consistency between ecdysis and iNaturalist data.

data/stub_handler.py.description: AWS Lambda handler stub. Routes invocations to the appropriate pipeline based on the event payload (pipeline: 'inat' | 'full').

infra/lib/beeatlas-stack.ts.description: Main CDK stack. Provisions S3 bucket, CloudFront distribution (main + redirect), Route53 DNS, GitHub OIDC deployer role, and Docker Lambda for the data pipeline with EventBridge nightly/weekly schedules.

infra/lib/global-stack.ts.description: Global CDK stack (us-east-1). Provisions ACM certificates for beeatlas.net and beeatlas.com (CloudFront requires certs in us-east-1), and Route53 hosted zones.

scripts/validate-schema.mjs.description: Pre-build parquet schema validation. Checks that ecdysis.parquet and samples.parquet have all columns the frontend expects. Reads local files if present, otherwise fetches from CloudFront using Range requests (footer only).
